prompt: Create a dramatic Japanese YouTube thumbnail in a hyper-aggressive clickbait style, 16:9 landscape, with a dark black-and-crimson background filled with red lightning, smoky clouds, glowing sparks, ink splatter, and explosive energy. The composition has 4 main text areas and 2 graphic icon elements. Across the top, place huge distressed white Japanese headline text reading 動画編集ディレクター, using an extra-bold block font with rough grunge texture, black outline, and heavy shadow. In the center, place the dominant oversized kanji 全滅 in a massive shattered font, red at the top fading to yellow at the bottom, with cracked stone texture, black border, debris fragments, and impact glow, occupying most of the frame. At the lower center, add a black slanted banner with a white border containing bright yellow and red Japanese text reading このままだと仕事がなくなる…!?, bold and urgent. On the left side, add a vertical black panel listing exactly 4 warning items, each preceded by a red X mark: 「案件減少」, 「単価下落」, 「AIの台頭」, 「オワコン化」. On the right side, show a cropped photo-real Japanese man from chest up, facing slightly left, wearing a black T-shirt, with short dark hair and a strong red rim light around his silhouette; his face is partially obscured by a rectangular mosaic censor block in skin-brown tones. At the lower right, include exactly 2 Adobe-style app icons, 「Pr」 and 「Ae」, dark blue-purple rounded squares, partially overlapping, both cracked like broken glass and crossed out with one large diagonal red paint slash X spanning the icons. Add a subtle dark city skyline silhouette in the lower left background. Overall look: sensational, destructive, high contrast, gritty, overloaded with texture, with intense red/black color grading, thick shadows, dramatic glow, and polished viral-thumbnail composition.
